name: SEKIJUN HAYASHI NO JUTSU (STALAGMITE FOREST TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 30 | Successes: 5

Perform: 18 | Perform DC: 34

Components: C, H

This difficult and powerful technique has you focus a large amount of Chakra into your hands and touch the ground, sending forth a seemingly subtle shockwave. Immediately after, 15 ft tall stalagmites erupt throughout the area, dealing 8d12 earth damage and leaving a forest of stony trees that resemble a thick forest, not providing enough space for Small-sized or larger creatures to fight in. The stalagmites remain for one day, or until dismissed.

This technique cannot be performed on water.
